haiku45.summary_excerpt: Deliverable is incomplete and cannot be shipped. Critical missing files: tests/cleanup.bats (workflow line 44 fails immediately), fixtures/sample.tsv, fixtures/args.txt. Task requires test harness that runs act, captures to act-result.txt, and validates exact output — not provided. Workflow runs bats directly instead of wrapping in required act test loop. No evidence of actionlint validation or TDD (failing test first). The cleanup.sh script itself is reasonable (set -euo, error handling, proper

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: High-quality implementation. Bash script uses robust patterns (set -euo pipefail, array-based record tracking). Workflow follows least-privilege permissions and includes thorough validation steps. Policy 3 (lines 135-157) is O(N^2) due to re-scanning in the loop, but logic is sound and clear.
